title: 'Abd al-Malik and the Kharijites
description: Also in this year, according to what is mentioned, 'Abd al-Malik sent `Umar b. `Ubaydallah b. Ma'mar to fight Abu Fudayk, ordering him to call up anyone he wanted from the two garrison cities to go with him. `Umar b. `Ubaydallah went to al-Kufah and called up its people; ten thousand answered his call. Then he went to al-Basrah and called up its people; ten thousand answered his call.83' Having issued them their provisions and given them their stipends, `Umar b. U baydallah marched forth with them. He placed the Kufans, led by Muhammad b. Musa b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 21
